title: Building footprint
description: One document per building. Used by both buildings_ms and buildings_google collections - the source field disambiguates. Geometry is a Polygon in WGS84 GeoJSON. divipola is denormalized at load time via a one-shot spatial join so per-municipality aggregations are O(index lookup) instead of O(spatial scan).

source_id.description: Original ID from upstream when available (e.g., Google plus_code or MS quadkey+row).

divipola.description: Containing PDET municipality code, populated by the spatial-join ETL step. Null for buildings outside PDET territories.

confidence.description: Model confidence; only Google ships this natively.

area_sqm.description: Polygon area in m2, computed in an equal-area projection at load time. Stored to avoid per-query reprojection.
